title: Success Criteria, Baselines, and Prompt Evals · Transfer Evaluation
summary: Define and test a support-triage prompt before optimizing its wording. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a versioned prompt evaluation harness with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define the user, task, decision, acceptable output, and material failure modes before drafting a prompt.
Turn subjective quality goals into observable criteria and representative test cases.
Create a minimal baseline prompt before adding scaffolding or examples.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-judge-review-71cpyh" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Judge Review into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-judge-review-71cpyh
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

stimulus.title: Judge Review failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: An LLM judge eliminates the need for calibrated human review.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Combine deterministic checks, rubric review, and human inspection without treating one judge as truth.

options.text: Keep the plausible output and hide the assumption to avoid confusing the stakeholder.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Judge Review condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Judge Review applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Combine deterministic checks, rubric review, and human inspection without treating one judge as truth.
